required_preferences.fact: Delegates all client-related accounting tasks, including complex reconciliations, to her team; focuses solely on business development, strategy, and external partnerships.

supersedes.fact: Delegates routine data entry to junior accountants; only personally handles complex reconciliations

required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes weeknight dinners with her daughter only — work or social activities may overlap, but avoids missing more than two dinners per week

supersedes.fact: Prioritizes family dinner together every weeknight — never schedules work or social activities during that time

required_preferences.fact: Attends at least one evening networking event each month, but never on audit deadlines week
Reviews industry news and nonprofit sector updates over breakfast each weekday to inform business development and partnership decisions.
Carefully reads nutrition labels for all grocery items, rejecting foods with added trans fats or overly processed ingredients
Schedules a daily check-in visit with her father every evening after work, never missing two consecutive days

persona: A mid-career accountant at a regional firm specializing in nonprofit organizations
